title: tesa Anti-Slip Tape - Non-Slip Adhesive Tape for Indoor and Outdoor Use - for Stairs, Ladders and Smooth Floors - Transparent - 5 m x 25 mm
features: tesa Anti-slip Tape: high-quality self-adhesive tape with a particularly coarse anti-slip coating for safe walking - can be used both indoors and outdoors and even on boats
Convenient and simple usage: the stable positioning on any surface and the serrated blade provide a perfect strip of tesafilm tape with little effort - the dispenser is repositionable at any time
Easy to apply: the anti-slip tape can be torn by hand and sticks permanently and firmly
Robust and wear-resistant: withstands strong UV and weather influences, high temperatures and is resistant to strong cleaning agents
Scope of delivery: 1 x tesa Anti-slip Tape - Dimensions: 5 m x 25 mm - Colour: transparent
description: From the manufacturer tesa anti-slip tape The robust tesa non-slip tape is particularly adhesive and reduces the risk of slipping on stairs, ladders and smooth floors in damp rooms. The robust tesa non-slip tape is the adhesive solution to dramatically reduce the risk of slipping on stairs, ladders and other smooth floors. With an extremely rough coating, the anti-slip strips ensure safety wherever it tends to be slippery. As the anti-slip tape is even salt water resistant, it can also be used on boats. The tape is easy to handle and split into matching anti-slip strips by hand. Product features: Extremely rough and durable non-slip coating For indoor and outdoor applications - can even be used on boats Ideal for stairs, ladders and smooth floors Strong adhesive and can be torn by hand High resistance to detergents Product variants: transparent, black, fluorescent View:
